answer:
<think> I'm thinking of the 2005 NCAA Championship game, where North Carolina won. I'm recalling that Rashad McCants was a key player for the Tar Heels. I'm also thinking of another player who was part of that team, and I believe it was Sean May. I'm trying to remember the other player who was part of that championship team. Ah, I've got it! The other player was Raymond Felton. So, the three players who won the championship for North Carolina were Rashad McCants, Sean May, and Raymond Felton. </think>
<answer> North Carolina </answer>
